title: Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew originating from Algeria, featuring tender lamb and flavorful spices.

ingredients.name: Lamb
ingredients.amount: 1 pound boneless shoulder, cut into 2-inch pieces

ingredients.name: Algerian
ingredients.amount: 2 teaspoons ras el hanout spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at Middle Eastern markets or online

instructions: Heat the oil in the bottom of a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the ras el hanout, preserved lemon, garlic, and chicken broth.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 1 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the honey, if using.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
